title: ‘I Got Back Every Penny’: Inside Trump’s Supercharged Tax Season
summary: The law Republicans passed last year has so far been largely imperceptible to most Americans. That’s changing as tens of millions file their taxes this spring.

title: The I.R.S. Shut Its Direct File, but Here Are Other Free Filing Options
summary: The agency still offers a Free File program that works with commercial tax software firms. Some companies also offer free tools for certain filers.

title: Judge Pauses Trump Demand for Student Race Data in 17 States
summary: The Trump administration had said it would collect data from colleges to ensure compliance with a Supreme Court ruling ending affirmative action in admissions.

title: Some Voters Say Congress Is Too Old. These Black Democrats Aren’t Leaving.
summary: As older members of Congress head for the exits amid growing pressure for fresh faces in the Democratic Party, some of the most seasoned Black lawmakers are resisting retirement.

title: China Built the World’s Drone Industry. Now It’s Locking Down the Skies.
summary: The Chinese government tightened rules to curb what it described as illegal drone use, but some users say the changes are now restricting too many flights.

title: ‘Hacks’ Has the Last Laugh
summary: As the HBO comedy finished production earlier this year, a photographer captured some of the final days on set and the showrunners looked back on its award-winning run.

title: Easter Reminds Us That Resurrection Is Everywhere
summary: Marriages, careers, reputations, financial stability and dreams can all die. But that’s not the end of the story.

title: Women Need Treatment for Hot Flashes. Why Is This So Hard?
summary: Hormone patches are in scarce supply because of increased demand — that’s mostly a good thing.

title: Hollywood Writers Union and Studios Reach Contract Deal
summary: With the global entertainment business reeling during a period of rapid change, there was little enthusiasm on either side for a costly standoff.

title: Dozens Killed in Haiti Massacre as International Force Trickles In
summary: Gangs tore through several rural communities last weekend, underscoring the challenges that will face the new, U.N.-backed Gang Suppression Force starting to enter the country.

title: Where Are NASA’s Artemis II Astronauts Now? Closer to the Moon Than Earth.
summary: The astronauts said they had lost track of which day it is on Earth on their transit to the moon.

title: For Many Patients Leaving the I.C.U., the Struggle Has Only Just Begun
summary: A long stay in intensive care can bring physical, cognitive and mental health challenges that can take months or longer to resolve.
